name: White Steed of the Floral Knights
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>花</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はな</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>騎</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>士</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>団</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>だん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>白</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>はく</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>馬</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ば</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: If you control a Level 2 or lower monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. You can only Special Summon "White Steed of the Floral Knights" once per turn this way. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card you control; negate the attack, and if you do, destroy that targeted card. You can only use this effect of "White Steed of the Floral Knights" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If you control a Level 2 or lower monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. You can only Special Summon "White Steed of the Floral Knights" once per turn this way. When an opponent's monster declares an attack: You can banish this card from your GY, then target 1 card you control; negate the attack, and if you do, destroy that targeted card. You can only use this effect of "White Steed of the Floral Knights" once per turn.
eff: If you control a Level 2 or lower monster, you can Special Summon this card (from your hand) in Defense Position. You can only Special Summon "White Steed of the Floral Knights" once per turn this way. You can only use this effect of "White Steed of the Floral Knights" once per turn.

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summon by its own condition once per turn
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
